name: Shahin Mirkhan
title: Founder & Broker of Record
specialization: Commercial Real Estate, Retail Plazas, Residential
bio: Through over 30 years of direct experience in entrepreneurial real estate business environments, Shahin has negotiated over $2 billion in real estate transactions including multiple property types for domestic and foreign clients. He founded Max Realty Solutions to build a brokerage where agents thrive and clients receive exceptional service on every transaction.

name: Hootan Ghovanloo
title: Vice-President & Broker
bio: Hootan brings extensive brokerage expertise to Max Realty Solutions as Vice-President and Broker. Fluent in English and Farsi, he serves a diverse client base across the Greater Toronto Area with a focus on delivering results for both buyers and sellers.

name: Ali Mirkhan
title: VP Operations
bio: Ali leads operations at Max Realty Solutions, overseeing the day-to-day functions of the brokerage and driving the technology and marketing initiatives that keep the team ahead of the curve in the competitive GTA market.

name: Fred Hamrahi
title: Sales Representative
bio: Fred is a dedicated Sales Representative at Max Realty Solutions with a client-first approach to every transaction. He works with buyers and sellers across the Greater Toronto Area, providing expert guidance and personalized service.
